summary: Swipeable photo interface with redirect button to external link
architectural_notes: Photo swiping interface with vertical/stacked layout
External link integration with deep linking support

existing_features.title: Implement a swipeable photo interface where swiping transitions between the two Attack on Titan t-shirt product photos with one appearing below the other in a stacked layout

Add a 'Lookout' button to the swipeable photo interface that redirects users to the Meesho affiliate link: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=418433257&ext_id=6x4h61&utm_source=instagram_stories
Integrate the new swipeable photo interface into an appropriate location in the app, either as a new section on the ProductBrowse page or as a standalone route
